calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintff Abdessamad Tabits Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Sanctions Of $1,950 Against Plaintiff And/Or Morgan & Morgan Purusant To Code Of Civil Procedure Se
Off Calendar Apr-30-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT JIN CHEN's Motion To Compel Plaintff Abdessamad Tabits Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Sanctions Of $1,950 Against Plaintiff And/Or Morgan & Morgan Purusant To Code Of Civil Procedure Se.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JIN CHEN'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "CHEN") MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF ABDESSAMAD TABIT (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "TABIT") TO FURTHER RESPOND TO CERTAIN FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND FOR SANCTIONS OF $1,950.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFF IS UNOPPOSED. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT GRANTS THE MOTION AS FOLLOWS:
(1) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS PLAINTIFF WILL DELIVER TO DEFENDANT WITHOUT OBJECTION, VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS.2.5, 2.6, 4.1, 6, 7 & 17.1 (AS TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS. 1-3, 5, 7 - 11).
(2) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF ONE THOUSAND, NINE HUNDRED FIFTY DOLLARS ($1,950.00) AGAINST PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL PAYABLE IN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS TO DEFENDANT AND HIS COUNSEL.
COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, DELIVER A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON APRIL 30, 2024 REGARDLESS WHETHER HE HAS RECEIVED AN APPROVAL.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
